name: Subscript
description: B2B SaaS billing and revenue operations platform unifying invoicing, metrics, ARR, and revenue recognition.

seo.title: Subscript — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Subscript: B2B SaaS billing and revenue operations platform unifying invoicing, metrics, ARR, and revenue recognition.

when_to_use: Unified invoicing, ARR, and revenue recognition for B2B SaaS
Billing operations platform replacing spreadsheets for B2B teams
Multi-year contract billing with amendment tracking

pros: Unifies billing, ARR metrics, and revenue recognition
Strong for B2B SaaS with negotiated contracts
Good invoice customization and approval workflows
Integrates with Salesforce, HubSpot, and ERPs
cons: Not built for self-serve high-volume transactions
Smaller community than Chargebee or Recurly
Usage-based billing not its core strength
review.verdict: Tidy revenue operations platform for B2B SaaS; especially useful if you're drowning in manual invoicing.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS scale-ups with negotiated deals needing ARR, rev rec, and invoicing in one tool.
review.not_for: PLG self-serve products, high-volume consumer SaaS, or early-stage startups.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
